title: The Skinwalker Ranch
author: George Knapp
content: The theory claims a Utah property is a hotbed for UAPs, portal phenomena, and high-strangeness activity.
action: Unexplained anomalies in remote areas draw intense scientific and military interest.

title: The Stargate Project
author: CIA (declassified)
content: The theory suggests the US government actively researched psychic phenomena like remote viewing for military intelligence.
action: States will fund any research that offers an asymmetric intelligence advantage.

title: The 1947 Roswell Crash
author: UFO research groups
content: The theory posits that a recovered extraterrestrial craft and its occupants were concealed by the US military.
action: Sudden military cover-ups create an enduring vacuum for alternative explanations.

title: The D.B. Cooper Disappearance
author: Various investigators
content: The theory suggests the infamous hijacker survived a mid-air jump and successfully evaded capture indefinitely.
action: Successful, unsolvable crimes naturally evolve into romanticized folklore.

title: The Georgia Guidestones
author: R.C. Christian
content: The theory claims the monument was a set of instructions for a New World Order to depopulate humanity.
action: Mysterious, unsolicited public mandates inevitably trigger fears of global agendas.
